name: agent-response
title: AgentResponse
description: Ordered renderer for normalized immutable agent response parts inside a generic incoming message.

intent.summary: Ordered renderer for normalized immutable agent response parts inside a generic incoming message.
useWhen: An agent response combines Markdown, user-safe activity, display-only tools, attachments, and sources in authored order.
avoidWhen: The component would be expected to own a model, transport, persistence, title generation, approval policy, or private reasoning.
accessibility: Part order matches authored reading order and remains inside generic message semantics.
Streaming state supplements rather than replaces meaningful textual status.
states: The owner replaces immutable part arrays as scripted or live output changes.
responsiveBehavior: Rich content uses the wider ghost message treatment while respecting transcript constraints.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: parts.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
